title: Age Rating Information
description: Age rating information for BarkinMad Studios apps, including our policy on social features, user-generated content and Apple Game Center services.
heading: Age Rating Information
intro: BarkinMad Studios develops family-friendly games and applications. At the time of publication, this page explains the age-rating questions used by the App Store and our current approach to social features, user-generated content and online services.

hero.alt: Family-friendly games and apps from BarkinMad Studios

sections.heading: Social features
paragraphs: Currently, BarkinMad Studios apps do not include public social networking.
list: Players cannot post publicly visible content.
Players cannot upload photographs or videos for other users.

sections.heading: User-generated content
paragraphs: Currently, BarkinMad Studios apps do not allow users to publish content that is visible to other users.
BarkinMad Studios does not operate its own social platform.

sections.heading: Multiplayer features
paragraphs: Currently, online multiplayer is limited to Quick Match gameplay only. Multiplayer sessions exist only for the duration of the game.
list: No public user profiles hosted by BarkinMad Studios.

sections.heading: Online features
paragraphs: Where supported by an app, online features may include Apple Game Center authentication, matchmaking, leaderboards and achievements.

subsections.heading: Apple Game Center
paragraphs: Game Center leaderboards and achievements are Apple services. BarkinMad Studios does not operate its own social networking platform.
Players cannot communicate with each other through Game Center within the apps. Apple's own parental controls and terms apply to Game Center functionality.

subsections.heading: Apple SharePlay
paragraphs: Currently, BarkinMad Studios apps do not support Apple SharePlay.
Should SharePlay be introduced in a future release, this page and the App Store age-rating information will be updated accordingly.

sections.heading: Information for parents
paragraphs: BarkinMad Studios apps are designed to be suitable for their published App Store age rating.
Parents can use Apple's Screen Time and parental controls to manage device and service access.
No third-party social-network account is required to use BarkinMad Studios apps.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: If you have questions about this age-rating information, please contact BarkinMad Studios support at support@barkinmad.studio.
